full_text:
Cheng Lian 成廉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Lian (成廉). General noted for his courage under Lü Bu. In novel, killed by Yue Jin. Cheng Lian was affiliated with Lu Bu. Cheng Lian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
